sections.paragraph: , more often רֵק f. רֵקָה adj. empty, vain, used of vessels, Jdg 7:16 2Ki 4:3 of ears of corn (vanas aristas, Virg.), Gen 41:27 of an empty, i.e. hungry soul, Isa 29:8. See נֶפֶשׁ No. 2 compare Isa 32:6. Metaph.-(a) empty, vain, Deu 32:47.-(b) empty, impoverished, poor, Neh 5:13.-(c) worthless, wicked, Jud. 9:4 11:3 2Sa 6:20.
